chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeals 289, 290, 291, 292, 293, 294, 295, 296 & 297 of 2016 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply at “A” 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.3213/2016 24.09.2025 Messrs. Zafar Hussain, Muhammad Siddique and Ameer Nausherwan Adil, advocates for the appellants Messrs. Aamir Raza and Zohaib Alam, advocates for respondent It is jointly submitted that the issue pending in these matters has been squarely determined by the Supreme Court in the judgment reported as 2018 SCMR 1444. Learned counsel states that it may be just and proper to dispose of these appeals in terms of the judgment as aforesaid. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters. Judge Judge Amjad
